positive: A stylized minimalist abstract jungle creature print. Focus on a geometric sloth hanging from stylized tropical leaves and vines. The sloth has a calm, serene expression and is rendered in deep teal and moss green tones. The overall design should have high contrast, clean silhouettes, and a repeating tile pattern layout suitable for repeating textile print. Incorporate subtle geometric elements, dot patterns, and simplified botanical forms (like monstera leaves and orchids). Use a limited, rich color palette of emerald green, deep teal, warm mustard yellow, and charcoal black. Art style: Mid-century modern illustration meets Art Deco graphic novel. Composition: Centralized motif suitable for a full-chest print, with strong outlines and flat color blocks. Lighting: Flat, even, bright studio lighting for maximum print clarity. Aspect ratio must be perfect square.
negative: blur, watermark, signature, logo, text, copyright, anime, painting, sketch, noise, messy, grainy, artifacts, extra limbs, malformed, bad anatomy, low resolution, bleeding colors, distracting background details
